ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "appearances" INTEGER /* Total number of appearances made by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by teams the player was part of */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses by teams the player was part of */,
  "goals_per_match" REAL /* Average goals scored per match by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player (e.g., Goalkeeper, Defender, Midfielder, Forward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team participates */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing in the match */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the match */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., League, Cup, International) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which statistics were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player for whom the statistics are recorded */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in this match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in this match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in this match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in this match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target made by the player in the match */,
  "chances_created" INTEGER /* Number of chances created by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 2023) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the season is played */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Total years of coaching experience */,
  "trophy_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of trophies won by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee involved in the transfer */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract signed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match that the report pertains to */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing match performance */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_reports_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injury_history" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was injured */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the injury in days */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injury_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contract_history" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that signed the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contract_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contract_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match that the lineup pertains to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the lineup belongs to */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation used by the team in the match */,
  "lineup_players" TEXT /* List of players in the starting lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_lineups_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_lineups_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match that the event occurred in */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Goal, Yellow Card, Substitution) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
